column1: # Known inter-chromosomal translocations for WheatCoordDB pipeline
# Format (tab-separated):
#   assembly  cs_chr  bp_proximal  bp_distal  tgt_chr_translocated  trans_side
# trans_side: which CS arm goes to tgt_chr_translocated
#   distal   -- cs_midpoint >= bp_distal maps to tgt_chr_trans
#   proximal -- cs_midpoint <= bp_proximal maps to tgt_chr_trans
# bp_proximal / bp_distal define the CS breakpoint interval (bp).
# Genes between bp_proximal and bp_distal are in the transition zone and
# are assigned by their actual tgt_chr mapping (pass-through).
# Source: Walkowiak et al. (2020) Nature https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-020-2961-x
# Robertsonian 5B/7B translocation in ArinaLrFor and SY Mattis.
# ArinaLrFor / SY_Mattis chromosome structure:
#   Assembly Chr5B (488 Mb) = 5BS (from CS Chr5B 0-157 Mb)
#                           + 7BS (from CS Chr7B 0-325 Mb, inverted)
#   Assembly Chr7B (993 Mb) = 7BL (from CS Chr7B 325-762 Mb, inverted)
#                           + 5BL (from CS Chr5B 166-715 Mb)
# Therefore:
#   CS Chr5B 0-157 Mb (5BS)    -> assembly Chr5B  [collinear, no entry needed]
#   CS Chr5B 166+ Mb (5BL)     -> assembly Chr7B  [distal translocation]
#   CS Chr7B 0-325 Mb (7BS)    -> assembly Chr5B  [collinear, inverted orientation]
#   CS Chr7B 380+ Mb (7BL)     -> assembly Chr7B  [distal translocation, inverted]
# assembly
ArinaLrFor
ArinaLrFor
SY_Mattis
SY_Mattis
